summary: This bundle records deterministic proof that the self-dogfood HTML renderers write reviewer-first static HTML indexes over the JSON source bundles.

evidenceScope.claimBoundary: Only the CLI reference claim that the renderers provide the first human-readable decision surface over the same JSON bundle is marked satisfied.
notClaimed: A human reviewer necessarily understands or agrees with the rendered decision
The HTML replaces summary.json, report.json, or review-summary.json as source of truth
Browser visual layout quality is proven across devices
Every report renderer in the product is covered by this self-dogfood claim

notableAssertions: the rendered self-dogfood HTML starts with Cautilus Self-Dogfood and includes Decision Summary, What happened, What to inspect next, and Inspect review
the rendered self-dogfood HTML places Decision Summary before the table of contents and detail sections
the rendered self-dogfood HTML footer states that summary.json, report.json, and review-summary.json remain the generated source bundle
cautilus self-dogfood render-experiments-html writes artifacts/self-dogfood/experiments/latest/index.html and includes the experiments title plus comparison row
the rendered experiments HTML places Decision Summary before the table of contents and comparison details
self-dogfood renderer includes Decision Summary, What happened, Review recommendation, and headline status fields
experiments renderer includes Decision Summary, A/B Comparison, and data-compare-row entries
both renderer families write index.html next to the latest bundle
both renderer families include table-of-contents anchors for the decision surface sections

decision.reason: Focused CLI and runtime tests verify that both self-dogfood HTML renderers produce static index.html pages with decision-first headings, section navigation, and source-bundle footers over the same JSON artifacts.
